The commit is on main. Let me verify the environment target (should be dev based on standard workflow):

## Phase 3: Output Result

Based on my analysis:

1. **Repository**: gw-spa (identified from pr:gw-spa/941 label)
2. **PR #941**: Merged to main on April 15, 2026 at 18:29:59 UTC (merge commit: ac06d766)
3. **Most recent deploy-dev build**: #385 (ID: 5382627) completed April 14, 2026 at 19:44:16 EDT
4. **Deployment gap**: ~18.75 hours between last deployment and PR merge
5. **Target environment**: dev (no env-* label specified, using default)
6. **Environment URL**: https://dev.generalwisdom.com

The code has been merged to main but **has NOT been deployed** to the dev environment yet. A new deploy-dev build needs to run to deploy the changes.
